label: Distributed systems & networking

node.label: Distributed systems & networking
node.definition: Coordination, communication, consistency, scheduling, and fault tolerance enable large-scale training and serving.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Distributed systems & networking is modeled as depending on Algorithms & data structures, Complexity & computability and feeding downstream nodes such as Multimodal, simulated & streaming data, Federated & privacy-preserving learning, Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts.
examples: atlas downstream link to Multimodal, simulated & streaming data
atlas downstream link to Federated & privacy-preserving learning
atlas downstream link to Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Algorithms & data structures, Complexity & computability.

dependencies.rationale: Distributed systems & networking rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.
In this atlas graph, Distributed systems & networking has a `requires` dependency on Complexity & computability with `core` strength.
